name: insforge
description: The agent-native Backend-as-a-Service. Built for agent-native builders. InsForge gives AI agents the primitives to ship full-stack apps: database CRUD with RLS, authentication, storage, edge functions, AI, realtime, Stripe payments, and deployments. Includes CLI infrastructure management, debugging diagnostics, and integration guides for third-party auth providers (Auth0, Clerk, Kinde, Stytch, WorkOS).
